# **\--Finaies Interface--**

* # Isekai History

  * A natural evolution of the Finaies that allowed them to use basic elemental soul Energy interface.

* # Soul Energy to Spell Conversion

  * Soul Energy conceptualizes a spell through the movement of the left hand while both hands are tied together.

* # Interface

  * Air drawn of logograms with one hand. See below.

* # Casting Spells

* ## **Summary**

  * After drawing the spell on air, hold to charge, then release.

* ## **Step 1- Visualize Spell shape**

  * See Language \> Finaies Interface Language  
  * Hold the two fingers with the other hand for the element to appear  
    ![][image1]

* ## **Step 2 \- Hold**

  * Keep your fingers clenched to power up the holding hand. The longer you hold, the stronger the spell will be at the cost of Soul Energy. Other Finaies can touch you to give you Soul Energy, and more quickly power up the spell.  
    ![][image2]

* ## **Step 3 \- Apply soul energy**

  * Separate your fingers to release the spell. Cock your arm for a ranged attack.  
    **![][image3]**

# 

# **\--Cat. Elemental--**

**Spells within this category are released on air or as a projectile if you cock your arm back and release the spell when pushing it forward**

# **Fire**

* **Scientific Notes**  
  * Create a ball of the element.  
* **Interface**  
  * ![][image4]  
* **Tiers**  
  * See General Power Effects  
    * \*Cm

* **Scientific Notes**  
  * Create a ball of the element.  
* **Interface**

* **Tiers**
